system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_order_get","body":"
CREATE PROC [dbo].[TR_ORDER_Get]
( 
	@Type nvarchar(50)
)
AS
BEGIN
    IF @Type = 'ALL'
    BEGIN
	  -- SELECT customer
		 --  , order_number
		 --  , SUM(order_qty) AS order_qty
		 --  , SUM(ship_qty) AS ship_qty
		 --  , order_date
		 --  , ship_date
		 --  , cont_date
		 --  , Finished
		 --  , CASE
			--WHEN SUM(order_qty) <= SUM(ship_qty) THEN 1
			--ELSE 0
			--END AS hoanthanh
	  -- FROM   tr_order_detail
	  -- WHERE  f_cancelled = 'N' AND choduyet = '1'
	  -- GROUP BY customer
			--, order_number
			--, order_date
			--, ship_date
			--, cont_date
			--, Finished
	  -- ORDER BY order_date DESC
	  SELECT	A.customer, 
				A.order_number, 
				SUM(B.order_qty) AS order_qty,
				SUM(B.ship_qty) AS ship_qty,
				A.order_date, 
				A.ship_date, 
				A.etd AS cont_date,
				A.Finished AS hoanthanh, 
				A.Finished,
				A.cust_po_number,
				A.create_by,
				A.create_date
		   FROM tr_order A
			  LEFT JOIN tr_order_detail B ON A.order_number = B.order_number
		   WHERE A.f_cancelled = 'N'  AND A.choduyet = 1
		   GROUP BY A.customer, A.order_number, 
			  A.order_date, A.ship_date, A.etd,
			  A.Finished, A.cust_po_number,
				A.create_by,
				A.create_date
		   ORDER BY A.order_date DESC
    END

    IF @Type = 'FINISH'
    BEGIN
	  -- SELECT customer
		 --  , order_number
		 --  , SUM(order_qty) AS order_qty
		 --  , SUM(ship_qty) AS ship_qty
		 --  , order_date
		 --  , ship_date
		 --  , cont_date
		 --  , Finished
		 --  , 1 AS hoanthanh
	  -- FROM   tr_order_detail
	  -- WHERE  f_cancelled = 'N'
			--AND Finished = 1
			--AND choduyet = '1'
	  -- GROUP BY customer
			--, order_number
			--, order_date
			--, ship_date
			--, cont_date
			--, Finished
	  -- ORDER BY order_date DESC
			SELECT 
				A.customer, 
				A.order_number, 
				SUM(B.order_qty) AS order_qty,
				SUM(B.ship_qty) AS ship_qty,
				A.order_date, 
				A.ship_date, 
				A.etd AS cont_date,
				A.Finished AS hoanthanh, 
				A.Finished,
				A.cust_po_number,
				A.create_by,
				A.create_date
		   FROM tr_order A
			  LEFT JOIN tr_order_detail B ON A.order_number = B.order_number
		   WHERE A.f_cancelled = 'N' AND A.Finished = 1  AND A.choduyet = 1
		   GROUP BY A.customer, A.order_number, 
			  A.order_date, A.ship_date, A.etd,
			  A.Finished, A.cust_po_number,
				A.create_by,
				A.create_date
		   ORDER BY A.order_date DESC
    END

    IF @Type = 'NOT'
    BEGIN
	  -- SELECT customer
		 --  , order_number
		 --  , SUM(order_qty) AS order_qty
		 --  , SUM(ship_qty) AS ship_qty
		 --  , order_date
		 --  , ship_date
		 --  , cont_date
		 --  , Finished
		 --  , 0 AS hoanthanh
	  -- FROM   tr_order_detail
	  -- WHERE  f_cancelled = 'N'
			--AND Finished = 0
			--AND choduyet = '1'
	  -- GROUP BY customer
			--, order_number
			--, order_date
			--, ship_date
			--, cont_date
			--, Finished
	  -- ORDER BY order_date DESC
			SELECT 
				A.customer, 
				A.order_number, 
				SUM(B.order_qty) AS order_qty,
				SUM(B.ship_qty) AS ship_qty,
				A.order_date, 
				A.ship_date, 
				A.etd AS cont_date,
				A.Finished AS hoanthanh, 
				A.Finished,
				A.cust_po_number,
				A.create_by,
				A.create_date
		   FROM tr_order A
			  LEFT JOIN tr_order_detail B ON A.order_number = B.order_number
		   WHERE A.f_cancelled = 'N' AND A.Finished = 0  AND A.choduyet = 1
		   GROUP BY A.customer, A.order_number, 
			  A.order_date, A.ship_date, A.etd,
			  A.Finished, A.cust_po_number,
				A.create_by,
				A.create_date
		   ORDER BY A.order_date DESC
    END
END","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
